tEn: Deep High-Resolution Representation Learning for Human Pose Estimation
tZh: 深度高分辨率表示学习用于人体姿态估计
sEn: Our network maintains high-resolution representations throughout the whole process, leading to more accurate keypoint heatmaps.
sZh: 我们的网络在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示，从而得到更准确的关键点热图。
absEn: This is an official pytorch implementation of Deep High-Resolution Representation Learning for Human Pose Estimation. In this work, we are interested in the human pose estimation problem with a focus on learning reliable high-resolution representations. Most existing methods recover high-resolution representations from low-resolution representations produced by a high-to-low resolution network. Instead, our proposed network maintains high-resolution representations through the whole process. We start from a high-resolution subnetwork as the first stage, gradually add high-to-low resolution subnetworks one by one to form more stages, and connect the mutli-resolution subnetworks in parallel. We conduct repeated multi-scale fusions such that each of the high-to-low resolution representations receives information from other parallel representations over and over, leading to rich high-resolution representations. As a result, the predicted keypoint heatmap is potentially more accurate and spatially more precise. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our network through the superior pose estimation results over two benchmark datasets: the COCO keypoint detection dataset and the MPII Human Pose dataset. The code and models have been publicly available at \url{https://github.com/leoxiaobin/deep-high-resolution-net.pytorch}.
absZh: 本文是深度高分辨率表示学习用于人体姿态估计的官方PyTorch实现。我们关注人体姿态估计问题，重点学习可靠的高分辨率表示。大多数现有方法从高到低分辨率网络产生的低分辨率表示中恢复高分辨率表示。相反，我们提出的网络在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示。我们从高分辨率子网络作为第一阶段开始，逐步添加高到低分辨率子网络形成更多阶段，并将多分辨率子网络并行连接。我们进行重复的多尺度融合，使得每个高到低分辨率表示反复从其他并行表示接收信息，从而产生丰富的高分辨率表示。因此，预测的关键点热图可能更准确且空间上更精确。我们通过在两个基准数据集（COCO关键点检测数据集和MPII人体姿态数据集）上的优越姿态估计结果，实证证明了我们网络的有效性。代码和模型已在https://github.com/leoxiaobin/deep-high-resolution-net.pytorch公开。

contrib.en: Proposes High-Resolution Net (HRNet) that maintains high-resolution representations throughout the whole process.
contrib.zh: 提出高分辨率网络（HRNet），在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示。

contrib.en: Connects high-to-low resolution subnetworks in parallel instead of series, enabling spatially precise heatmap prediction.
contrib.zh: 并行连接高到低分辨率子网络，而非串联，实现空间精确的热图预测。

contrib.en: Introduces repeated multi-scale fusion across parallel subnetworks to enrich high-resolution representations.
contrib.zh: 引入跨并行子网络的重复多尺度融合，以丰富高分辨率表示。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on COCO keypoint detection, MPII Human Pose, and PoseTrack datasets.
contrib.zh: 在COCO关键点检测、MPII人体姿态和PoseTrack数据集上取得最先进结果。

contrib.en: Demonstrates superior efficiency with lower computational cost and model size compared to prior methods.
contrib.zh: 与先前方法相比，以更低的计算成本和模型大小展现出卓越效率。

contrib.en: Validates effectiveness through ablation studies on multi-scale fusion and resolution maintenance.
contrib.zh: 通过多尺度融合和分辨率保持的消融研究验证了有效性。

limits.en: Focuses on single-person pose estimation; multi-person scenarios rely on external person detectors.
limits.zh: 专注于单人姿态估计；多人场景依赖外部人体检测器。

limits.en: Performance on MPII dataset saturates; larger model does not improve results.
limits.zh: 在MPII数据集上性能饱和；更大模型未提升结果。

limits.en: Requires careful tuning of network depth and width for different tasks.
limits.zh: 需要针对不同任务仔细调整网络深度和宽度。

limits.en: Multi-scale fusion increases memory and computation during training.
limits.zh: 多尺度融合在训练期间增加内存和计算量。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to human pose estimation; generalization to other dense prediction tasks not fully explored.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于人体姿态估计；对其他密集预测任务的泛化性未充分探索。

items.en: In this paper, we are interested in the human pose estimation problem with a focus on learning reliable high-resolution representations. Most existing methods recover high-resolution representations from low-resolution representations produced by a high-to-low resolution network. Instead, our proposed network maintains high-resolution representations through the whole process.
items.zh: 本文关注人体姿态估计问题，重点在于学习可靠的高分辨率表示。现有方法大多从高到低分辨率网络产生的低分辨率表示中恢复高分辨率表示。相反，我们提出的网络在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示。

items.en: We start from a high-resolution subnetwork as the first stage, gradually add high-to-low resolution subnetworks one by one to form more stages, and connect the mutli-resolution subnetworks in parallel. We conduct repeated multi-scale fusions such that each of the high-to-low resolution representations receives information from other parallel representations over and over, leading to rich high-resolution representations. As a result, the predicted keypoint heatmap is potentially more accurate and spatially more precise. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our network through the superior pose estimation results over two benchmark datasets: the COCO keypoint detection dataset and the MPII Human Pose dataset. In addition, we show the superiority of our network in pose tracking on the PoseTrack dataset. The code and models have been publicly available at https://github.com/leoxiaobin/deep-high-resolution-net.pytorch.
items.zh: 我们从第一阶段的髙分辨率子网络开始，逐步逐个添加高到低分辨率子网络以形成更多阶段，并将多分辨率子网络并行连接。我们进行重复的多尺度融合，使得每个高到低分辨率表示反复从其他并行表示接收信息，从而产生丰富的高分辨率表示。因此，预测的关键点热图可能更准确且空间上更精确。我们通过在两个基准数据集（COCO关键点检测数据集和MPII人体姿态数据集）上优越的姿态估计结果，实证证明了我们网络的有效性。此外，我们在PoseTrack数据集上展示了我们的网络在姿态跟踪方面的优越性。代码和模型已在https://github.com/leoxiaobin/deep-high-resolution-net.pytorch公开。

items.en: 222D human pose estimation has been a fundamental yet challenging problem in computer vision. The goal is to localize human anatomical keypoints (e.g., elbow, wrist, etc.) or parts. It has many applications, including human action recognition, human-computer interaction, animation, etc. This paper is interested in single-person pose estimation, which is the basis of other related problems, such as multi-person pose estimation [6, 27, 33, 39, 47, 57, 41, 46, 17, 71], video pose estimation and tracking [49, 72], etc.
items.zh: 二维人体姿态估计一直是计算机视觉中一个基本但具有挑战性的问题。目标是定位人体解剖关键点（例如肘部、手腕等）或部位。它有许多应用，包括人体动作识别、人机交互、动画等。本文关注单人姿态估计，这是其他相关问题的基础，如多人姿态估计[6, 27, 33, 39, 47, 57, 41, 46, 17, 71]、视频姿态估计与跟踪[49, 72]等。

items.en: The recent developments show that deep convolutional neural networks have achieved the state-of-the-art performance. Most existing methods pass the input through a network, typically consisting of high-to-low resolution subnetworks that are connected in series, and then raise the resolution. For instance, Hourglass [40] recovers the high resolution through a symmetric low-to-high process. SimpleBaseline [72] adopts a few transposed convolution layers for generating high-resolution representations. In addition, dilated convolutions are also used to blow up the later layers of a high-to-low resolution network (e.g., VGGNet or ResNet) [27, 77].
items.zh: 最新进展表明，深度卷积神经网络已实现最先进的性能。大多数现有方法将输入通过一个网络，该网络通常由串联的高到低分辨率子网络组成，然后提高分辨率。例如，Hourglass[40]通过对称的低到高过程恢复高分辨率。SimpleBaseline[72]采用少量转置卷积层生成高分辨率表示。此外，膨胀卷积也被用于放大高到低分辨率网络（如VGGNet或ResNet）的后期层[27, 77]。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Illustrating the architecture of the proposed HRNet. It consists of parallel high-to-low resolution subnetworks with repeated information exchange across multi-resolution subnetworks (multi-scale fusion). The horizontal and vertical directions correspond to the depth of the network and the scale of the feature maps, respectively.
items.capZh: 图1：展示所提出的HRNet架构。它由并行的高到低分辨率子网络组成，并在多分辨率子网络之间重复进行信息交换（多尺度融合）。水平和垂直方向分别对应网络的深度和特征图的尺度。

items.en: We present a novel architecture, namely High-Resolution Net (HRNet), which is able to maintain high-resolution representations through the whole process. We start from a high-resolution subnetwork as the first stage, gradually add high-to-low resolution subnetworks one by one to form more stages, and connect the multi-resolution subnetworks in parallel. We conduct repeated multi-scale fusions by exchanging the information across the parallel multi-resolution subnetworks over and over through the whole process. We estimate the keypoints over the high-resolution representations output by our network. The resulting network is illustrated in Figure 1.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的架构，即高分辨率网络（HRNet），它能够在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示。我们从第一阶段的髙分辨率子网络开始，逐步逐个添加高到低分辨率子网络以形成更多阶段，并将多分辨率子网络并行连接。我们通过在整个过程中反复在并行多分辨率子网络之间交换信息，进行重复的多尺度融合。我们在网络输出的高分辨率表示上估计关键点。所得网络如图1所示。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Illustration of representative pose estimation networks that rely on the high-to-low and low-to-high framework. (a) Hourglass [40]. (b) Cascaded pyramid networks [11]. (c) SimpleBaseline [72]: transposed convolutions for low-to-high processing. (d) Combination with dilated convolutions [27]. Bottom-right legend: reg. = regular convolution, dilated = dilated convolution, trans. = transposed convolution, strided = strided convolution, concat. = concatenation. In (a), the high-to-low and low-to-high processes are symmetric. In (b), (c) and (d), the high-to-low process, a part of a classification network (ResNet or VGGNet), is heavy, and the low-to-high process is light. In (a) and (b), the skip-connections (dashed lines) between the same-resolution layers of the high-to-low and low-to-high processes mainly aim to fuse low-level and high-level features. In (b), the right part, refinenet, combines the low-level and high-level features that are processed through convolutions.
items.capZh: 图2：说明依赖高到低和低到高框架的代表性姿态估计网络。(a) Hourglass[40]。(b) 级联金字塔网络[11]。(c) SimpleBaseline[72]：用于低到高处理的转置卷积。(d) 结合膨胀卷积[27]。右下角图例：reg. = 常规卷积，dilated = 膨胀卷积，trans. = 转置卷积，strided = 步长卷积，concat. = 拼接。在(a)中，高到低和低到高过程是对称的。在(b)、(c)和(d)中，高到低过程（分类网络ResNet或VGGNet的一部分）是重的，而低到高过程是轻的。在(a)和(b)中，高到低和低到高过程之间相同分辨率层的跳跃连接（虚线）主要旨在融合低级和高级特征。在(b)中，右侧部分refinenet结合了经过卷积处理的低级和高级特征。

items.en: Our network has two benefits in comparison to existing widely-used networks [40, 27, 77, 72] for pose estimation. (\romannum1) Our approach connects high-to-low resolution subnetworks in parallel rather than in series as done in most existing solutions. Thus, our approach is able to maintain the high resolution instead of recovering the resolution through a low-to-high process, and accordingly the predicted heatmap is potentially spatially more precise. (\romannum2) Most existing fusion schemes aggregate low-level and high-level representations. Instead, we perform repeated multi-scale fusions to boost the high-resolution representations with the help of the low-resolution representations of the same depth and similar level, and vice versa, resulting in that high-resolution representations are also rich for pose estimation. Consequently, our predicted heatmap is potentially more accurate.
items.zh: 与现有广泛使用的姿态估计网络[40, 27, 77, 72]相比，我们的网络有两个优点。(1) 我们的方法将高到低分辨率子网络并行连接，而不是像大多数现有解决方案那样串联。因此，我们的方法能够保持高分辨率，而不是通过低到高过程恢复分辨率，因此预测的热图在空间上可能更精确。(2) 大多数现有融合方案聚合低级和高级表示。相反，我们执行重复的多尺度融合，借助相同深度和相似级别的低分辨率表示来增强高分辨率表示，反之亦然，从而使得高分辨率表示对于姿态估计也很丰富。因此，我们预测的热图可能更准确。

items.en: We empirically demonstrate the superior keypoint detection performance over two benchmark datasets: the COCO keypoint detection dataset [36] and the MPII Human Pose dataset [2]. In addition, we show the superiority of our network in video pose tracking on the PoseTrack dataset [1].
items.zh: 我们在两个基准数据集（COCO关键点检测数据集[36]和MPII人体姿态数据集[2]）上实证展示了优越的关键点检测性能。此外，我们在PoseTrack数据集[1]上展示了我们的网络在视频姿态跟踪方面的优越性。

items.en: Most traditional solutions to single-person pose estimation adopt the probabilistic graphical model or the pictorial structure model [79, 50], which is recently improved by exploiting deep learning for better modeling the unary and pair-wise energies [9, 65, 45] or imitating the iterative inference process [13]. Nowadays, deep convolutional neural network provides dominant solutions [20, 35, 62, 42, 43, 48, 58, 16]. There are two mainstream methods: regressing the position of keypoints [66, 7], and estimating keypoint heatmaps [13, 14, 78] followed by choosing the locations with the highest heat values as the keypoints.
items.zh: 大多数传统的单人姿态估计解决方案采用概率图模型或图像结构模型[79, 50]，最近通过利用深度学习更好地建模一元和成对能量[9, 65, 45]或模拟迭代推理过程[13]而得到改进。如今，深度卷积神经网络提供了主导解决方案[20, 35, 62, 42, 43, 48, 58, 16]。有两种主流方法：回归关键点位置[66, 7]和估计关键点热图[13, 14, 78]，然后选择热值最高的位置作为关键点。

items.en: Most convolutional neural networks for keypoint heatmap estimation consist of a stem subnetwork similar to the classification network, which decreases the resolution, a main body producing the representations with the same resolution as its input, followed by a regressor estimating the heatmaps where the keypoint positions are estimated and then transformed in the full resolution. The main body mainly adopts the high-to-low and low-to-high framework, possibly augmented with multi-scale fusion and intermediate (deep) supervision.
items.zh: 大多数用于关键点热图估计的卷积神经网络由一个类似于分类网络的茎子网络（降低分辨率）、一个主体（产生与其输入相同分辨率的表示）以及一个回归器（估计热图，其中关键点位置被估计然后转换到全分辨率）组成。主体主要采用高到低和低到高框架，可能辅以多尺度融合和中间（深度）监督。

items.en: High-to-low and low-to-high. The high-to-low process aims to generate low-resolution and high-level representations, and the low-to-high process aims to produce high-resolution representations [4, 11, 23, 72, 40, 62]. Both the two processes are possibly repeated several times for boosting the performance [77, 40, 14].
items.zh: 高到低和低到高。高到低过程旨在生成低分辨率和高层表示，低到高过程旨在产生高分辨率表示[4, 11, 23, 72, 40, 62]。这两个过程可能重复多次以提升性能[77, 40, 14]。

items.en: Representative network design patterns include: (\romannum1) Symmetric high-to-low and low-to-high processes. Hourglass and its follow-ups [40, 14, 77, 31] design the low-to-high process as a mirror of the high-to-low process. (\romannum2) Heavy high-to-low and light low-to-high. The high-to-low process is based on the ImageNet classification network, e.g., ResNet adopted in [11, 72], and the low-to-high process is simply a few bilinear-upsampling [11] or transpose convolution [72] layers. (\romannum3) Combination with dilated convolutions. In [27, 51, 35], dilated convolutions are adopted in the last two stages in the ResNet or VGGNet to eliminate the spatial resolution loss, which is followed by a light low-to-high process to further increase the resolution, avoiding expensive computation cost for only using dilated convolutions [11, 27, 51]. Figure 2 depicts four representative pose estimation networks.
items.zh: 代表性的网络设计模式包括：(1) 对称的高到低和低到高过程。Hourglass及其后续工作[40, 14, 77, 31]将低到高过程设计为高到低过程的镜像。(2) 重高到低和轻低到高。高到低过程基于ImageNet分类网络，例如[11, 72]中采用的ResNet，而低到高过程仅仅是几个双线性上采样[11]或转置卷积[72]层。(3) 结合膨胀卷积。在[27, 51, 35]中，膨胀卷积被用于ResNet或VGGNet的最后两个阶段以消除空间分辨率损失，随后是一个轻量级的低到高过程以进一步提高分辨率，避免了仅使用膨胀卷积的高昂计算成本[11, 27, 51]。图2描绘了四个代表性的姿态估计网络。

items.en: Multi-scale fusion. The straightforward way is to feed multi-resolution images separately into multiple networks and aggregate the output response maps [64]. Hourglass [40] and its extensions [77, 31] combine low-level features in the high-to-low process into the same-resolution high-level features in the low-to-high process progressively through skip connections. In cascaded pyramid network [11], a globalnet combines low-to-high level features in the high-to-low process progressively into the low-to-high process, and then a refinenet combines the low-to-high level features that are processed through convolutions. Our approach repeats multi-scale fusion, which is partially inspired by deep fusion and its extensions [67, 73, 59, 80, 82].
items.zh: 多尺度融合。直接的方法是将多分辨率图像分别输入多个网络并聚合输出响应图[64]。Hourglass[40]及其扩展[77, 31]通过跳跃连接逐步将高到低过程中的低级特征组合到低到高过程中相同分辨率的高级特征中。在级联金字塔网络[11]中，globalnet逐步将高到低过程中的低到高级特征组合到低到高过程中，然后refinenet组合经过卷积处理的低到高级特征。我们的方法重复多尺度融合，部分受到深度融合及其扩展[67, 73, 59, 80, 82]的启发。

items.en: Intermediate supervision. Intermediate supervision or deep supervision, early developed for image classification [34, 61], is also adopted for helping deep networks training and improving the heatmap estimation quality, e.g., [69, 40, 64, 3, 11]. The hourglass approach [40] and the convolutional pose machine approach [69] process the intermediate heatmaps as the input or a part of the input of the remaining subnetwork.
items.zh: 中间监督。中间监督或深度监督，早期用于图像分类[34, 61]，也被用于帮助深度网络训练和提高热图估计质量，例如[69, 40, 64, 3, 11]。Hourglass方法[40]和卷积姿态机方法[69]将中间热图作为剩余子网络的输入或输入的一部分。

items.en: Our approach. Our network connects high-to-low subnetworks in parallel. It maintains high-resolution representations through the whole process for spatially precise heatmap estimation. It generates reliable high-resolution representations through repeatedly fusing the representations produced by the high-to-low subnetworks. Our approach is different from most existing works, which need a separate low-to-high upsampling process and aggregate low-level and high-level representations. Our approach, without using intermediate heatmap supervision, is superior in keypoint detection accuracy and efficient in computation complexity and parameters.
items.zh: 我们的方法。我们的网络并行连接高到低子网络。它通过整个过程中保持高分辨率表示以实现空间精确的热图估计。它通过反复融合高到低子网络产生的表示来生成可靠的高分辨率表示。我们的方法不同于大多数现有工作，后者需要单独的低到高上采样过程并聚合低级和高级表示。我们的方法不使用中间热图监督，在关键点检测精度上更优，并且在计算复杂度和参数数量上更高效。

items.en: There are related multi-scale networks for classification and segmentation [5, 8, 74, 81, 30, 76, 55, 56, 24, 83, 55, 52, 18]. Our work is partially inspired by some of them [56, 24, 83, 55], and there are clear differences making them not applicable to our problem. Convolutional neural fabrics [56] and interlinked CNN [83] fail to produce high-quality segmentation results because of a lack of proper design on each subnetwork (depth, batch normalization) and multi-scale fusion. The grid network [18], a combination of many weight-shared U-Nets, consists of two separate fusion processes across multi-resolution representations: on the first stage, information is only sent from high resolution to low resolution; on the second stage, information is only sent from low resolution to high resolution, and thus less competitive. Multi-scale densenets [24] does not target and cannot generate reliable high-resolution representations.
items.zh: 存在用于分类和分割的相关多尺度网络[5, 8, 74, 81, 30, 76, 55, 56, 24, 83, 55, 52, 18]。我们的工作部分受到其中一些[56, 24, 83, 55]的启发，但存在明显差异使其不适用于我们的问题。卷积神经织物[56]和互连CNN[83]由于缺乏对每个子网络（深度、批归一化）和多尺度融合的适当设计，无法产生高质量的分割结果。网格网络[18]是许多权重共享U-Net的组合，包含两个独立的多分辨率表示融合过程：在第一阶段，信息仅从高分辨率发送到低分辨率；在第二阶段，信息仅从低分辨率发送到高分辨率，因此竞争力较弱。多尺度密集网络[24]不针对也无法生成可靠的高分辨率表示。

items.en: Human pose estimation, a.k.a. keypoint detection, aims to detect the locations of K𝐾K keypoints or parts (e.g., elbow, wrist, etc) from an image 𝐈𝐈\mathbf{I} of size W×H×3𝑊𝐻3W\times H\times 3. The state-of-the-art methods transform this problem to estimating K𝐾K heatmaps of size W′×H′superscript𝑊′superscript𝐻′W^{{}^{\prime}}\times H^{{}^{\prime}}, {𝐇1,𝐇2,…,𝐇K}subscript𝐇1subscript𝐇2…subscript𝐇𝐾\{\mathbf{H}_{1},\mathbf{H}_{2},\dots,\mathbf{H}_{K}\}, where each heatmap 𝐇ksubscript𝐇𝑘\mathbf{H}_{k} indicates the location confidence of the k𝑘kth keypoint.
items.zh: 人体姿态估计，也称为关键点检测，旨在从大小为W×H×3的图像I中检测K个关键点或部位（例如肘部、手腕等）的位置。最先进的方法将此问题转化为估计大小为W'×H'的K个热图{H1, H2, ..., HK}，其中每个热图Hk指示第k个关键点的位置置信度。

items.en: We follow the widely-adopted pipeline [40, 72, 11] to predict human keypoints using a convolutional network, which is composed of a stem consisting of two strided convolutions decreasing the resolution, a main body outputting the feature maps with the same resolution as its input feature maps, and a regressor estimating the heatmaps where the keypoint positions are chosen and transformed to the full resolution. We focus on the design of the main body and introduce our High-Resolution Net (HRNet) that is depicted in Figure 1.
items.zh: 我们遵循广泛采用的流程[40, 72, 11]，使用卷积网络预测人体关键点，该网络由茎（两个步长卷积降低分辨率）、主体（输出与其输入特征图相同分辨率的特征图）和回归器（估计热图，从中选择关键点位置并转换到全分辨率）组成。我们专注于主体的设计，并介绍我们的高分辨率网络（HRNet），如图1所示。

items.en: Sequential multi-resolution subnetworks. Existing networks for pose estimation are built by connecting high-to-low resolution subnetworks in series, where each subnetwork, forming a stage, is composed of a sequence of convolutions and there is a down-sample layer across adjacent subnetworks to halve the resolution.
items.zh: 顺序多分辨率子网络。现有的姿态估计网络通过串联高到低分辨率子网络构建，其中每个子网络形成一个阶段，由一系列卷积组成，相邻子网络之间有一个下采样层将分辨率减半。

items.en: Let 𝒩s​rsubscript𝒩𝑠𝑟\mathcal{N}_{sr} be the subnetwork in the s𝑠sth stage and r𝑟r be the resolution index (Its resolution is 12r−11superscript2𝑟1\frac{1}{2^{r-1}} of the resolution of the first subnetwork). The high-to-low network with S𝑆S (e.g., 444) stages can be denoted as:
items.zh: 设 𝒩_sr 为第 s 阶段的子网络，r 为分辨率索引（其分辨率为第一个子网络分辨率的 1/2^(r-1)）。具有 S 个（例如 4 个）阶段的高到低网络可表示为：

items.en: Parallel multi-resolution subnetworks. We start from a high-resolution subnetwork as the first stage, gradually add high-to-low resolution subnetworks one by one, forming new stages, and connect the multi-resolution subnetworks in parallel. As a result, the resolutions for the parallel subnetworks of a later stage consists of the resolutions from the previous stage, and an extra lower one.
items.zh: 并行多分辨率子网络。我们从高分辨率子网络作为第一阶段开始，逐步逐个添加高到低分辨率子网络，形成新阶段，并将多分辨率子网络并行连接。因此，后一阶段的并行子网络的分辨率由前一阶段的分辨率和一个额外的较低分辨率组成。

items.en: An example network structure, containing 444 parallel subnetworks, is given as follows,
items.zh: 一个包含 4 个并行子网络的示例网络结构如下：

items.capEn: Figure 3: Illustrating how the exchange unit aggregates the information for high, medium and low resolutions from the left to the right, respectively. Right legend: strided 3×3333\times 3 = strided 3×3333\times 3 convolution, up samp. 1×1111\times 1 = nearest neighbor up-sampling following a 1×1111\times 1 convolution.
items.capZh: 图 3：说明交换单元如何分别从左到右聚合高、中、低分辨率的信息。右图图例：strided 3×3 = 步长为 3×3 的卷积，up samp. 1×1 = 最近邻上采样后接 1×1 卷积。

items.en: Repeated multi-scale fusion. We introduce exchange units across parallel subnetworks such that each subnetwork repeatedly receives the information from other parallel subnetworks. Here is an example showing the scheme of exchanging information. We divided the third stage into several (e.g., 333) exchange blocks, and each block is composed of 333 parallel convolution units with an exchange unit across the parallel units, which is given as follows,
items.zh: 重复的多尺度融合。我们在并行子网络之间引入交换单元，使得每个子网络反复接收来自其他并行子网络的信息。这里是一个展示信息交换方案的示例。我们将第三阶段划分为多个（例如 3 个）交换块，每个块由 3 个并行卷积单元和一个跨并行单元的交换单元组成，如下所示：

items.en: where 𝒞s​rbsubscriptsuperscript𝒞𝑏𝑠𝑟\mathcal{C}^{b}_{sr} represents the convolution unit in the r𝑟rth resolution of the b𝑏bth block in the s𝑠sth stage, and ℰsbsubscriptsuperscriptℰ𝑏𝑠\mathcal{E}^{b}_{s} is the corresponding exchange unit.
items.zh: 其中 𝒞_sr^b 表示第 s 阶段第 b 块中第 r 个分辨率的卷积单元，ℰ_s^b 是相应的交换单元。

items.en: We illustrate the exchange unit in Figure 3 and present the formulation in the following. We drop the subscript s𝑠s and the superscript b𝑏b for discussion convenience. The inputs are s𝑠s response maps: {𝐗1,𝐗2,…,𝐗s}subscript𝐗1subscript𝐗2…subscript𝐗𝑠\{\mathbf{X}_{1},\mathbf{X}_{2},\dots,\mathbf{X}_{s}\}. The outputs are s𝑠s response maps: {𝐘1,𝐘2,…,𝐘s}subscript𝐘1subscript𝐘2…subscript𝐘𝑠\{\mathbf{Y}_{1},\mathbf{Y}_{2},\dots,\mathbf{Y}_{s}\}, whose resolutions and widths are the same to the input. Each output is an aggregation of the input maps, 𝐘k=∑i=1sa​(𝐗i,k)subscript𝐘𝑘superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑠𝑎subscript𝐗𝑖𝑘\mathbf{Y}_{k}=\sum_{i=1}^{s}a(\mathbf{X}_{i},k). The exchange unit across stages has an extra output map 𝐘s+1subscript𝐘𝑠1\mathbf{Y}_{s+1}: 𝐘s+1=a​(𝐘s,s+1)subscript𝐘𝑠1𝑎subscript𝐘𝑠𝑠1\mathbf{Y}_{s+1}=a(\mathbf{Y}_{s},s+1).
items.zh: 我们在图 3 中说明了交换单元，并在下文中给出公式。为方便讨论，我们省略下标 s 和上标 b。输入是 s 个响应图：{X_1, X_2, …, X_s}。输出是 s 个响应图：{Y_1, Y_2, …, Y_s}，其分辨率和宽度与输入相同。每个输出是输入图的聚合：Y_k = ∑_{i=1}^s a(X_i, k)。跨阶段的交换单元有一个额外的输出图 Y_{s+1}：Y_{s+1} = a(Y_s, s+1)。

items.en: The function a​(𝐗i,k)𝑎subscript𝐗𝑖𝑘a(\mathbf{X}_{i},k) consists of upsampling or downsampling 𝐗isubscript𝐗𝑖\mathbf{X}_{i} from resolution i𝑖i to resolution k𝑘k. We adopt strided 3×3333\times 3 convolutions for downsampling. For instance, one strided 3×3333\times 3 convolution with the stride 222 for 2×2\times downsampling, and two consecutive strided 3×3333\times 3 convolutions with the stride 222 for 4×4\times downsampling. For upsampling, we adopt the simple nearest neighbor sampling following a 1×1111\times 1 convolution for aligning the number of channels. If i=k𝑖𝑘i=k, a​(⋅,⋅)𝑎⋅⋅a(\cdot,\cdot) is just an identify connection: a​(𝐗i,k)=𝐗i𝑎subscript𝐗𝑖𝑘subscript𝐗𝑖a(\mathbf{X}_{i},k)=\mathbf{X}_{i}.
items.zh: 函数 a(X_i, k) 包括将 X_i 从分辨率 i 上采样或下采样到分辨率 k。我们采用步长为 3×3 的卷积进行下采样。例如，一个步长为 2 的 3×3 卷积用于 2× 下采样，两个连续的步长为 2 的 3×3 卷积用于 4× 下采样。对于上采样，我们采用简单的最近邻采样，后接一个 1×1 卷积以对齐通道数。如果 i=k，则 a(·,·) 只是一个恒等连接：a(X_i, k) = X_i。

items.en: Heatmap estimation. We regress the heatmaps simply from the high-resolution representations output by the last exchange unit, which empirically works well. The loss function, defined as the mean squared error, is applied for comparing the predicted heatmaps and the groundtruth heatmaps. The groundtruth heatmpas are generated by applying 222D Gaussian with standard deviation of 111 pixel centered on the grouptruth location of each keypoint.
items.zh: 热图估计。我们简单地从最后一个交换单元输出的高分辨率表示回归热图，这在经验上效果很好。损失函数定义为均方误差，用于比较预测热图和真实热图。真实热图通过以每个关键点的真实位置为中心、标准差为 1 像素的 2D 高斯生成。

items.en: Network instantiation. We instantiate the network for keypoint heatmap estimation by following the design rule of ResNet to distribute the depth to each stage and the number of channels to each resolution.
items.zh: 网络实例化。我们遵循 ResNet 的设计规则来实例化用于关键点热图估计的网络，将深度分配到每个阶段，将通道数分配到每个分辨率。

items.en: The main body, i.e., our HRNet, contains four stages with four parallel subnetworks, whose the resolution is gradually decreased to a half and accordingly the width (the number of channels) is increased to the double. The first stage contains 444 residual units where each unit, the same to the ResNet-505050, is formed by a bottleneck with the width 646464, and is followed by one 3×3333\times 3 convolution reducing the width of feature maps to C𝐶C. The 222nd, 333rd, 444th stages contain 111, 444, 333 exchange blocks, respectively. One exchange block contains 444 residual units where each unit contains two 3×3333\times 3 convolutions in each resolution and an exchange unit across resolutions. In summary, there are totally 888 exchange units, i.e., 888 multi-scale fusions are conducted.
items.zh: 主体部分，即我们的 HRNet，包含四个阶段和四个并行子网络，其分辨率逐渐减半，相应地宽度（通道数）加倍。第一阶段包含 4 个残差单元，每个单元与 ResNet-50 相同，由宽度为 64 的瓶颈组成，后接一个 3×3 卷积将特征图的宽度减少到 C。第 2、3、4 阶段分别包含 1、4、3 个交换块。一个交换块包含 4 个残差单元，每个单元在每个分辨率中包含两个 3×3 卷积和一个跨分辨率的交换单元。总之，总共有 8 个交换单元，即进行了 8 次多尺度融合。

items.en: In our experiments, we study one small net and one big net: HRNet-W323232 and HRNet-W484848, where 323232 and 484848 represent the widths (C𝐶C) of the high-resolution subnetworks in last three stages, respectively. The widths of other three parallel subnetworks are 64,128,2566412825664,128,256 for HRNet-W323232, and 96,192,3849619238496,192,384 for HRNet-W484848.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们研究了一个小网络和一个大网络：HRNet-W32 和 HRNet-W48，其中 32 和 48 分别表示最后三个阶段中高分辨率子网络的宽度（C）。其他三个并行子网络的宽度对于 HRNet-W32 分别为 64、128、256，对于 HRNet-W48 分别为 96、192、384。

items.en: Dataset. The COCO dataset [36] contains over 200,000200000200,000 images and 250,000250000250,000 person instances labeled with 171717 keypoints. We train our model on COCO train201720172017 dataset, including 57​K57𝐾57K images and 150​K150𝐾150K person instances. We evaluate our approach on the val201720172017 set and test-dev201720172017 set, containing 500050005000 images and 20​K20𝐾20K images, respectively.
items.zh: 数据集。COCO 数据集 [36] 包含超过 200,000 张图像和 250,000 个人体实例，标注了 17 个关键点。我们在 COCO train2017 数据集上训练模型，包括 57K 张图像和 150K 个人体实例。我们在 val2017 集和 test-dev2017 集上评估我们的方法，分别包含 5000 张图像和 20K 张图像。

items.en: Evaluation metric. The standard evaluation metric is based on Object Keypoint Similarity (OKS): OKS=∑iexp⁡(−di2/2​s2​ki2)​δ​(vi>0)∑iδ​(vi>0).OKSsubscript𝑖superscriptsubscript𝑑𝑖22superscript𝑠2superscriptsubscript𝑘𝑖2𝛿subscript𝑣𝑖0subscript𝑖𝛿subscript𝑣𝑖0\operatorname{OKS}=\frac{\sum_{i}\exp(-d_{i}^{2}/2s^{2}k_{i}^{2})\delta(v_{i}>0)}{\sum_{i}\delta(v_{i}>0)}. Here disubscript𝑑𝑖d_{i} is the Euclidean distance between the detected keypoint and the corresponding ground truth, visubscript𝑣𝑖v_{i} is the visibility flag of the ground truth, s𝑠s is the object scale, and kisubscript𝑘𝑖k_{i} is a per-keypoint constant that controls falloff. We report standard average precision and recall scores111http://cocodataset.org/#keypoints-eval: AP50superscriptAP50\operatorname{AP}^{50} (APAP\operatorname{AP} at OKS=0.50OKS0.50\operatorname{OKS}=0.50) AP75superscriptAP75\operatorname{AP}^{75}, APAP\operatorname{AP} (the mean of APAP\operatorname{AP} scores at 101010 positions, OKS=0.50,0.55,…,0.90,0.95OKS0.500.55…0.900.95\operatorname{OKS}=0.50,0.55,\dots,0.90,0.95; APMsuperscriptAP𝑀\operatorname{AP}^{M} for medium objects, APLsuperscriptAP𝐿\operatorname{AP}^{L} for large objects, and ARAR\operatorname{AR} at OKS=0.50,0.55,…,0.90,0.955OKS0.500.55…0.900.955\operatorname{OKS}=0.50,0.55,\dots,0.90,0.955.
items.zh: 评估指标。标准评估指标基于对象关键点相似度（OKS）：OKS = ∑_i exp(-d_i^2 / (2 s^2 k_i^2)) δ(v_i > 0) / ∑_i δ(v_i > 0)。其中 d_i 是检测到的关键点与对应真实值之间的欧氏距离，v_i 是真实值的可见性标志，s 是对象尺度，k_i 是每个关键点的常数，控制衰减。我们报告标准的平均精度和召回率分数：AP^50（OKS=0.50 时的 AP），AP^75，AP（在 10 个位置 OKS=0.50, 0.55, …, 0.90, 0.95 上 AP 分数的平均值），AP^M（中等物体），AP^L（大物体），以及 AR（在 OKS=0.50, 0.55, …, 0.90, 0.95 上）。

items.en: Training. We extend the human detection box in height or width to a fixed aspect ratio: height:width=4:3:heightwidth4:3\operatorname{height}:\operatorname{width}=4:3, and then crop the box from the image, which is resized to a fixed size, 256×192256192256\times 192 or 384×288384288384\times 288. The data augmentation includes random rotation ([−45​°,45​°]-45°45°[$$,$$]), random scale ([0.65,1.35]0.651.35[0.65,1.35]), and flipping. Following [68], half body data augmentation is also involved.
items.zh: 训练。我们将人体检测框的高度或宽度扩展到固定的宽高比：height:width = 4:3，然后从图像中裁剪该框，并将其调整为固定大小 256×192 或 384×288。数据增强包括随机旋转（[-45°, 45°]）、随机缩放（[0.65, 1.35]）和翻转。遵循 [68]，还涉及半身数据增强。

items.en: We use the Adam optimizer [32]. The learning schedule follows the setting [72]. The base learning rate is set as 1​e−31e31\mathrm{e}{-3}, and is dropped to 1​e−41e41\mathrm{e}{-4} and 1​e−51e51\mathrm{e}{-5} at the 170170170th and 200200200th epochs, respectively. The training process is terminated within 210210210 epochs.
items.zh: 我们使用 Adam 优化器 [32]。学习率计划遵循设置 [72]。基础学习率设置为 1e-3，并在第 170 和 200 个 epoch 时分别降至 1e-4 和 1e-5。训练过程在 210 个 epoch 内终止。

items.en: Testing. The two-stage top-down paradigm similar as [47, 11, 72] is used: detect the person instance using a person detector, and then predict detection keypoints.
items.zh: 测试。使用类似于 [47, 11, 72] 的两阶段自顶向下范式：使用人体检测器检测人体实例，然后预测检测关键点。

items.en: We use the same person detectors provided by SimpleBaseline222https://github.com/Microsoft/human-pose-estimation.pytorch [72] for both validation set and test-dev set. Following the common practice [72, 40, 11], we compute the heatmap by averaging the headmaps of the original and flipped images. Each keypoint location is predicted by adjusting the highest heatvalue location with a quarter offset in the direction from the highest response to the second highest response.
items.zh: 我们使用 SimpleBaseline 提供的相同人体检测器用于验证集和 test-dev 集。遵循常见做法 [72, 40, 11]，我们通过平均原始图像和翻转图像的热图来计算热图。每个关键点位置通过从最高响应到第二高响应的方向，将最高热值位置调整四分之一偏移来预测。

items.en: Results on the validation set. We report the results of our method and other state-of–the-art methods in Table 1. Our small network - HRNet-W323232, trained from scratch with the input size 256×192256192256\times 192, achieves an 73.473.473.4 AP score, outperforming other methods with the same input size. (\romannum1) Compared to Hourglass [40], our small network improves AP by 6.56.56.5 points, and the GFLOPs of our network is much lower and less than half, while the number of parameters are similar and ours is slightly larger. (\romannum2) Compared to CPN [11] w/o and w/ OHKM, our network, with slightly larger model size and slightly higher complexity, achieves 4.84.84.8 and 4.04.04.0 points gain, respectively. (\romannum3) Compared to the previous best-performed SimpleBaseline [72], our small net HRNet-W323232 obtains significant improvements: 3.03.03.0 points gain for the backbone ResNet-505050 with a similar model size and GFLOPs, and 1.41.41.4 points gain for the backbone ResNet-152152152 whose model size (#Params) and GLOPs are twice as many as ours.
items.zh: 验证集上的结果。我们在表 1 中报告了我们的方法和其他最先进方法的结果。我们的小网络 HRNet-W32，从零开始训练，输入大小为 256×192，达到了 73.4 的 AP 分数，优于具有相同输入大小的其他方法。（i）与 Hourglass [40] 相比，我们的小网络 AP 提高了 6.5 个点，并且我们网络的 GFLOPs 更低，不到一半，而参数数量相似，我们的略大。（ii）与不带和带 OHKM 的 CPN [11] 相比，我们的网络在模型大小稍大、复杂度稍高的情况下，分别获得了 4.8 和 4.0 个点的提升。（iii）与之前表现最好的 SimpleBaseline [72] 相比，我们的小网络 HRNet-W32 取得了显著改进：对于类似模型大小和 GFLOPs 的骨干 ResNet-50，提升了 3.0 个点；对于模型大小（#Params）和 GFLOPs 都是我们两倍的骨干 ResNet-152，提升了 1.4 个点。

items.en: Our nets can benefit from (\romannum1) training from the model pretrained for the ImageNet classification problem: The gain is 1.01.01.0 points for HRNet-W323232; (\romannum2) increasing the capacity by increasing the width: Our big net HRNet-W484848 gets 0.70.70.7 and 0.50.50.5 improvements for the input sizes 256×192256192256\times 192 and 384×288384288384\times 288, respectively.
items.zh: 我们的网络可以从以下方面受益：（i）使用在 ImageNet 分类问题上预训练的模型进行训练：HRNet-W32 提升了 1.0 个点；（ii）通过增加宽度来增加容量：我们的大网络 HRNet-W48 在输入大小 256×192 和 384×288 上分别获得了 0.7 和 0.5 的提升。

items.en: Considering the input size 384×288384288384\times 288, our HRNet-W323232 and HRNet-W484848, get the 75.875.875.8 and 76.376.376.3 AP, which have 1.41.41.4 and 1.21.21.2 improvements compared to the input size 256×192256192256\times 192. In comparison to the SimpleBaseline [72] that uses ResNet-152152152 as the backbone, our HRNet-W323232 and HRNet-W484848 attain 1.51.51.5 and 2.02.02.0 points gain in terms of AP at 45%percent4545\% and 92.4%percent92.492.4\% computational cost, respectively.
items.zh: 考虑到输入尺寸384×288，我们的HRNet-W32和HRNet-W48分别获得了75.8和76.3的AP，相比输入尺寸256×192分别提升了1.4和1.2。与使用ResNet-152作为骨干网络的SimpleBaseline [72]相比，我们的HRNet-W32和HRNet-W48在45%和92.4%的计算成本下，AP分别提升了1.5和2.0个百分点。

items.en: Results on the test-dev set. Table 2 reports the pose estimation performances of our approach and the existing state-of-the-art approaches. Our approach is significantly better than bottom-up approaches. On the other hand, our small network, HRNet-W323232, achieves an AP of 74.974.974.9. It outperforms all the other top-down approaches, and is more efficient in terms of model size (#Params) and computation complexity (GFLOPs). Our big model, HRNet-W484848, achieves the highest 75.575.575.5 AP. Compared to the SimpleBaseline [72] with the same input size, our small and big networks receive 1.21.21.2 and 1.81.81.8 improvements, respectively. With additional data from AI Challenger [70] for training, our single big network can obtain an AP of 77.077.077.0.
items.zh: 测试集上的结果。表2报告了我们的方法与现有最先进方法在姿态估计上的性能。我们的方法显著优于自底向上的方法。另一方面，我们的小型网络HRNet-W32达到了74.9的AP，优于所有其他自顶向下的方法，并且在模型大小（#Params）和计算复杂度（GFLOPs）方面更高效。我们的大型模型HRNet-W48达到了最高的75.5 AP。与相同输入尺寸的SimpleBaseline [72]相比，我们的小型网络和大型网络分别获得了1.2和1.8的提升。使用来自AI Challenger [70]的额外数据进行训练，我们的单个大型网络可以获得77.0的AP。

items.en: Dataset. The MPII Human Pose dataset [2] consists of images taken from a wide-range of real-world activities with full-body pose annotations. There are around 25​K25𝐾25K images with 40​K40𝐾40K subjects, where there are 12​K12𝐾12K subjects for testing and the remaining subjects for the training set. The data augmentation and the training strategy are the same to MS COCO, except that the input size is cropped to 256×256256256256\times 256 for fair comparison with other methods.
items.zh: 数据集。MPII人体姿态数据集 [2] 包含来自广泛真实世界活动的图像，并带有全身姿态标注。约有25K张图像，包含40K个对象，其中12K个对象用于测试，其余用于训练集。数据增强和训练策略与MS COCO相同，但输入尺寸裁剪为256×256，以便与其他方法公平比较。

items.en: Testing. The testing procedure is almost the same to that in COCO except that we adopt the standard testing strategy to use the provided person boxes instead of detected person boxes. Following [14, 77, 62], a six-scale pyramid testing procedure is performed.
items.zh: 测试。测试过程与COCO几乎相同，但我们采用标准测试策略，使用提供的检测框而非检测到的检测框。遵循 [14, 77, 62]，执行六尺度金字塔测试。

items.en: Evaluation metric. The standard metric [2], the PCKh (head-normalized probability of correct keypoint) score, is used. A joint is correct if it falls within α​l𝛼𝑙\alpha l pixels of the groundtruth position, where α𝛼\alpha is a constant and l𝑙l is the head size that corresponds to 60%percent6060\% of the diagonal length of the ground-truth head bounding box. The PCKh@​0.5@0.5@0.5 (α=0.5𝛼0.5\alpha=0.5) score is reported.
items.zh: 评估指标。使用标准指标 [2]，即PCKh（头部归一化的关键点正确概率）分数。如果关键点落在真实位置的αl像素内，则认为该关键点正确，其中α是常数，l是头部尺寸，对应真实头部边界框对角线长度的60%。报告PCKh@0.5（α=0.5）分数。

items.en: Results on the test set. Tables 3 and 4 show the PCKh@​0.5@0.5@0.5 results, the model size and the GFLOPs of the top-performed methods. We reimplement the SimpleBaseline [72] by using ResNet-152152152 as the backbone with the input size 256×256256256256\times 256. Our HRNet-W323232 achieves a 92.392.392.3 PKCh@0.50.50.5 score, and outperforms the stacked hourglass approach [40] and its extensions [58, 14, 77, 31, 62]. Our result is the same as the best one [62] among the previously-published results on the leaderboard of Nov. 161616th, 201820182018333http://human-pose.mpi-inf.mpg.de/#results. We would like to point out that the approach [62], complementary to our approach, exploits the compositional model to learn the configuration of human bodies and adopts multi-level intermediate supervision, from which our approach can also benefit. We also tested our big network - HRNet-W484848 and obtained the same result 92.392.392.3. The reason might be that the performance in this datatset tends to be saturate.
items.zh: 测试集上的结果。表3和表4显示了性能最佳方法的PCKh@0.5结果、模型大小和GFLOPs。我们使用ResNet-152作为骨干网络，输入尺寸256×256，重新实现了SimpleBaseline [72]。我们的HRNet-W32达到了92.3的PCKh@0.5分数，优于堆叠沙漏方法 [40] 及其扩展 [58, 14, 77, 31, 62]。我们的结果与2018年11月16日排行榜上先前公布的最佳结果 [62] 相同。我们想指出，方法 [62] 与我们的方法互补，利用组合模型学习人体结构，并采用多级中间监督，我们的方法也可以从中受益。我们还测试了大型网络HRNet-W48，得到了相同的结果92.3。原因可能是该数据集的性能趋于饱和。

items.en: Dataset. PoseTrack [28] is a large-scale benchmark for human pose estimation and articulated tracking in video. The dataset, based on the raw videos provided by the popular MPII Human Pose dataset, contains 550550550 video sequences with 66,3746637466,374 frames. The video sequences are split into 292292292, 505050, 208208208 videos for training, validation, and testing, respectively. The length of the training videos ranges between 41−1514115141-151 frames, and 303030 frames from the center of the video are densely annotated. The number of frames in the validation/testing videos ranges between 65−2986529865-298 frames. The 303030 frames around the keyframe from the MPII Pose dataset are densely annotated, and afterwards every fourth frame is annotated. In total, this constitutes roughly 23,0002300023,000 labeled frames and 153,615153615153,615 pose annotations.
items.zh: 数据集。PoseTrack [28] 是一个用于视频中人体姿态估计和关节跟踪的大规模基准。该数据集基于流行的MPII人体姿态数据集提供的原始视频，包含550个视频序列，共66,374帧。视频序列分为292、50、208个视频，分别用于训练、验证和测试。训练视频的长度在41-151帧之间，视频中心的30帧被密集标注。验证/测试视频的帧数在65-298帧之间。MPII姿态数据集关键帧周围的30帧被密集标注，之后每四帧标注一次。总共约有23,000个标注帧和153,615个姿态标注。

items.en: Evaluation metric. We evaluate the results from two aspects: frame-wise multi-person pose estimation, and multi-person pose tracking. Pose estimation is evaluated by the mean Average Precision (mAP) as done in [51, 28]. Multi-person pose tracking is evaluated by the multi-object tracking accuracy (MOTA) [38, 28]. Details are given in [28].
items.zh: 评估指标。我们从两个方面评估结果：逐帧多人姿态估计和多人姿态跟踪。姿态估计通过平均精度（mAP）评估，如 [51, 28] 所述。多人姿态跟踪通过多目标跟踪精度（MOTA）评估 [38, 28]。细节见 [28]。

items.en: Training. We train our HRNet-W484848 for single person pose estimation on the PoseTrack201720172017 training set, where the network is initialized by the model pre-trained on COCO dataset. We extract the person box, as the input of our network, from the annotated keypoints in the training frames by extending the bounding box of all the keypoints (for one single person) by 15%percent1515\% in length. The training setup, including data augmentation, is almost the same as that for COCO except that the learning schedule is different (as now it is for fine-tuning): the learning rate starts from 1​e−41e41\mathrm{e}{-4}, drops to 1​e−51e51\mathrm{e}{-5} at the 101010th epoch, and to 1​e−61e61\mathrm{e}{-6} at the 151515th epoch; the iteration ends within 202020 epochs.
items.zh: 训练。我们在PoseTrack2017训练集上训练HRNet-W48用于单人姿态估计，网络使用在COCO数据集上预训练的模型初始化。我们从训练帧中的标注关键点提取检测框，作为网络输入，通过将所有关键点（针对单个人）的边界框在长度上扩展15%得到。训练设置（包括数据增强）与COCO几乎相同，但学习率调度不同（因为现在是微调）：学习率从1e-4开始，在第10个epoch降至1e-5，在第15个epoch降至1e-6；迭代在20个epoch内结束。

items.en: Testing. We follow [72] to track poses across frames. It consists of three steps: person box detection and propagation, human pose estimation, and pose association cross nearby frames. We use the same person box detector as used in SimpleBaseline [72], and propagate the detected box into nearby frames by propagating the predicted keypoints according to the optical flows computed by FlowNet 2.0 [26]444https://github.com/NVIDIA/flownet2-pytorch, followed by non-maximum suppression for box removing. The pose association scheme is based on the object keypoint similarity between the keypoints in one frame and the keypoints propagated from the nearby frame according to the optical flows. The greedy matching algorithm is then used to compute the correspondence between keypoints in nearby frames. More details are given in [72].
items.zh: 测试。我们遵循 [72] 跨帧跟踪姿态。包括三个步骤：检测框检测和传播、人体姿态估计、以及跨邻近帧的姿态关联。我们使用与SimpleBaseline [72] 相同的检测框检测器，并通过根据FlowNet 2.0 [26] 计算的光流传播预测的关键点，将检测到的框传播到邻近帧，然后进行非极大值抑制以去除框。姿态关联方案基于一帧中的关键点与根据光流从邻近帧传播的关键点之间的对象关键点相似性。然后使用贪心匹配算法计算邻近帧中关键点的对应关系。更多细节见 [72]。

items.en: Results on the PoseTrack201720172017 test set. Table 5 reports the results. Our big network - HRNet-W484848 achieves the superior result, a 74.974.974.9 mAP score and a 57.957.957.9 MOTA score. Compared with the second best approach, the FlowTrack in SimpleBaseline [72], that uses ResNet-152152152 as the backbone, our approach gets 0.30.30.3 and 0.10.10.1 points gain in terms of mAP and MOTA, respectively. The superiority over the FlowTrack [72] is consistent to that on the COCO keypoint detection and MPII human pose estimation datasets. This further implies the effectiveness of our pose estimation network.
items.zh: PoseTrack2017测试集上的结果。表5报告了结果。我们的大型网络HRNet-W48取得了优越的结果，mAP分数为74.9，MOTA分数为57.9。与第二好的方法，即使用ResNet-152作为骨干网络的SimpleBaseline [72] 中的FlowTrack相比，我们的方法在mAP和MOTA上分别获得了0.3和0.1个百分点的提升。与FlowTrack [72] 相比的优势与在COCO关键点检测和MPII人体姿态估计数据集上一致。这进一步证明了我们姿态估计网络的有效性。

items.en: We study the effect of each component in our approach on the COCO keypoint detection dataset. All results are obtained over the input size of 256×192256192256\times 192 except the study about the effect of the input size.
items.zh: 我们在COCO关键点检测数据集上研究了方法中每个组件的影响。除输入尺寸影响研究外，所有结果均在输入尺寸256×192下获得。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Qualitative results of some example images in the MPII (top) and COCO (bottom) datasets: containing viewpoint and appearance change, occlusion, multiple persons, and common imaging artifacts.
items.capZh: 图4：MPII（上）和COCO（下）数据集中一些示例图像的定性结果：包含视角和外观变化、遮挡、多人以及常见的成像伪影。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Ablation study of high and low representations. 1×1\times, 2×2\times, 4×4\times correspond to the representations of the high, medium, low resolutions, respectively.
items.capZh: 图5：高和低表示的消融研究。1×、2×、4×分别对应高、中、低分辨率表示。

items.en: Repeated multi-scale fusion. We empirically analyze the effect of the repeated multi-scale fusion. We study three variants of our network. (a) W/o intermediate exchange units (111 fusion): There is no exchange between multi-resolution subnetworks except the last exchange unit. (b) W/ across-stage exchange units only (333 fusions): There is no exchange between parallel subnetworks within each stage. (c) W/ both across-stage and within-stage exchange units (totally 888 fusion): This is our proposed method. All the networks are trained from scratch. The results on the COCO validation set given in Table 6 show that the multi-scale fusion is helpful and more fusions lead to better performance.
items.zh: 重复多尺度融合。我们经验性地分析了重复多尺度融合的效果。我们研究了网络的三种变体。(a) 无中间交换单元（1次融合）：除最后一个交换单元外，多分辨率子网络之间没有交换。(b) 仅跨阶段交换单元（3次融合）：每个阶段内的并行子网络之间没有交换。(c) 同时具有跨阶段和阶段内交换单元（总共8次融合）：这是我们提出的方法。所有网络从头开始训练。表6中COCO验证集的结果表明，多尺度融合是有帮助的，更多的融合导致更好的性能。

items.en: Resolution maintenance. We study the performance of a variant of the HRNet: all the four high-to-low resolution subnetworks are added at the beginning and the depth are the same; the fusion schemes are the same to ours. Both our HRNet-W323232 and the variant (with similar #Params and GFLOPs) are trained from scratch and tested on the COCO validation set. The variant achieves an AP of 72.572.572.5, which is lower than the 73.473.473.4 AP of our small net, HRNet-W323232. We believe that the reason is that the low-level features extracted from the early stages over the low-resolution subnetworks are less helpful. In addition, the simple high-resolution network of similar parameter and computation complexities without low-resolution parallel subnetworks shows much lower performance .
items.zh: 分辨率保持。我们研究了HRNet的一种变体的性能：所有四个高到低分辨率子网络在开始时添加，深度相同；融合方案与我们的相同。我们的HRNet-W32和该变体（具有相似的#Params和GFLOPs）都从头开始训练，并在COCO验证集上测试。该变体达到了72.5的AP，低于我们小型网络HRNet-W32的73.4 AP。我们认为原因是早期阶段从低分辨率子网络提取的低级特征帮助较小。此外，没有低分辨率并行子网络的类似参数和计算复杂度的简单高分辨率网络显示出更低的性能。

items.en: Representation resolution. We study how the representation resolution affects the pose estimation performance from two aspects: check the quality of the heatmap estimated from the feature maps of each resolution from high to low, and study how the input size affects the quality.
items.zh: 表示分辨率。我们从两个方面研究表示分辨率如何影响姿态估计性能：检查从高到低每个分辨率的特征图估计的热图质量，并研究输入尺寸如何影响质量。

items.en: We train our small and big networks initialized by the model pretrained for the ImageNet classification. Our network outputs four response maps from high-to-low solutions. The quality of heatmap prediction over the lowest-resolution response map is too low and the AP score is below 101010 points. The AP scores over the other three maps are reported in Figure 5. The comparison implies that the resolution does impact the keypoint prediction quality.
items.zh: 我们训练小型和大型网络，使用在ImageNet分类上预训练的模型初始化。我们的网络从高到低输出四个响应图。最低分辨率响应图上的热图预测质量太低，AP分数低于10分。其他三个图上的AP分数报告在图5中。比较表明分辨率确实影响关键点预测质量。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Illustrating how the performances of our HRNet and SimpleBaseline [72] are affected by the input size.
items.capZh: 图6：说明输入尺寸如何影响我们的HRNet和SimpleBaseline [72] 的性能。

items.en: In this paper, we present a high-resolution network for human pose estimation, yielding accurate and spatially-precise keypoint heatmaps. The success stems from two aspects: (\romannum1) maintain the high resolution through the whole process without the need of recovering the high resolution; and (\romannum2) fuse multi-resolution representations repeatedly, rendering reliable high-resolution representations.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于人体姿态估计的高分辨率网络，生成准确且空间精确的关键点热图。成功源于两个方面：(\romannum1) 在整个过程中保持高分辨率，无需恢复高分辨率；(\romannum2) 重复融合多分辨率表示，产生可靠的高分辨率表示。

items.en: The future works include the applications to other dense prediction tasks, e.g., semantic segmentation, object detection, face alignment, image translation, as well as the investigation on aggregating multi-resolution representations in a less light way. All them are available at https://jingdongwang2017.github.io/Projects/HRNet/index.html.
items.zh: 未来工作包括将方法应用于其他密集预测任务，例如语义分割、目标检测、人脸对齐、图像翻译，以及研究以更轻量级的方式聚合多分辨率表示。所有内容均可访问 https://jingdongwang2017.github.io/Projects/HRNet/index.html。

full.sec: Results on the MPII Validation Set

items.en: We provide the results on the MPII validation set [2]. Our models are trained on a subset of MPII training set and evaluate on a heldout validation set of 2975 images. The training procedure is the same to that for training on the whole MPII training set. The heatmap is computed as the average of the heatmaps of the original and flipped images for testing. Following [77, 62], we also perform six-scale pyramid testing procedure (multi-scale testing). The results are shown in Table 7.
items.zh: 我们在MPII验证集[2]上提供了结果。我们的模型在MPII训练集的一个子集上训练，并在包含2975张图像的保留验证集上评估。训练过程与在整个MPII训练集上训练相同。测试时，热图计算为原始图像和翻转图像热图的平均值。遵循[77, 62]，我们还执行了六尺度金字塔测试程序（多尺度测试）。结果如表7所示。

full.sec: More Results on the PoseTrack Dataset

items.en: We provide the results for all the keypoints on the PoseTrack dataset [1]. Table 8 shows the multi-person pose estimation performance on the PoseTrack201720172017 dataset. Our HRNet-W484848 achieves 77.3 and 74.9 points mAP on the validation and test setss, and outperforms previous state-of-the-art method [72] by 0.6 points and 0.3 points respectively. We provide more detailed results of multi-person pose tracking performance on the PoseTrack2017 test set as a supplement of the results reported in the paper, shown in Table 9.
items.zh: 我们在PoseTrack数据集[1]上提供了所有关键点的结果。表8展示了在PoseTrack201720172017数据集上的多人姿态估计性能。我们的HRNet-W484848在验证集和测试集上分别达到77.3和74.9 mAP，并分别以0.6和0.3个百分点的优势超越了先前的最先进方法[72]。作为论文中报告结果的补充，我们在表9中提供了PoseTrack2017测试集上多人姿态跟踪性能的更详细结果。

full.sec: Results on the ImageNet Validation Set

items.en: We apply our networks to image classification task. The models are trained and evaluated on the ImageNet 2013 classification dataset [54]. We train our models for 100 epochs with a batch size of 256. The initial learning rate is set to 0.1 and is reduced by 10 times at epoch 30, 60 and 90. Our models can achieve comparable performance as those networks specifically designed for image classification, such as ResNet [22]. Our HRNet-W323232 has a single-model top-5 validation error of 6.5% and has a single-model top-1 validation error of 22.7% with the single-crop testing. Our HRNet-W484848 gets better performance: 6.1% top-5 errors and 22.1% top-1 error. We use the models trained on the ImageNet dataset to initialize the parameters of our pose estimation networks.
items.zh: 我们将网络应用于图像分类任务。模型在ImageNet 2013分类数据集[54]上训练和评估。我们训练模型100个epoch，批次大小为256。初始学习率设为0.1，并在第30、60和90个epoch时降低10倍。我们的模型可以达到与专门为图像分类设计的网络（如ResNet[22]）相当的性能。我们的HRNet-W323232在单裁剪测试中，单模型top-5验证误差为6.5%，单模型top-1验证误差为22.7%。我们的HRNet-W484848获得了更好的性能：top-5误差为6.1%，top-1误差为22.1%。我们使用在ImageNet数据集上训练的模型来初始化姿态估计网络的参数。

items.en: Acknowledgements. The authors thank Dianqi Li and Lei Zhang for helpful discussions.
items.zh: 致谢。作者感谢Dianqi Li和Lei Zhang的有益讨论。
